Senior Platform Engineer
NovaPay — Edinburgh, UK (Remote)

About NovaPay
NovaPay is a Series B payments company providing embedded finance APIs to SaaS platforms across Europe. Our infrastructure handles millions of API calls daily with sub-100ms latency requirements.

The Role
We need a Senior Platform Engineer to build and maintain the foundational infrastructure that our engineering teams rely on. You will design scalable, secure, and cost-effective cloud infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code principles.

Responsibilities
- Design and manage AWS infrastructure using Terraform modules
- Build and maintain Kubernetes clusters for microservice deployments
- Develop and improve CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and ArgoCD
- Implement observability solutions (metrics, logs, traces) across all services
- Write internal tooling and CLI utilities in Go
- Lead incident response and conduct post-mortems
- Define and enforce platform standards and best practices

Requirements
- 5+ years of experience in platform engineering, SRE, or DevOps
- Expert-level knowledge of Kubernetes (EKS preferred) and Helm
- Strong Terraform skills with experience managing multi-account AWS environments
- Proficiency in Go for building internal tools and operators
- Deep understanding of CI/CD best practices and GitOps workflows
- Experience with monitoring stacks (Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog)

Nice to Have
- AWS certifications (Solutions Architect, DevOps Engineer)
- Experience with service mesh technologies (Istio, Linkerd)
- Knowledge of FinOps and cloud cost optimisation
- Familiarity with policy-as-code tools (OPA, Kyverno)

Salary: GBP 85,000 - 110,000 + equity
Remote Policy: Fully remote (UK-based)
